PMCRO Docs
Table of Contents

Class IntentEnvelope

Namespace
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models
Assembly
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.dll

I AM the IntentEnvelope — the bloodstream of the PMCRO loop. I carry the high-level goal and evolving state for a PMCRO Trail. Every phase reads and augments me. No field is optional once I am sealed. I MUST have federation_shielded: true before entering the Orchestrator.

public sealed class IntentEnvelope
Inheritance
object
IntentEnvelope
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Properties

AocInvited

ArchitectOfCognition invitation flag. Always true — ARCH-008.

CreatedAt

UTC timestamp of envelope creation by Federation Board.

CurrentIntent

The current cycle's specific target. Updated by Planner (truest_intent promotion) and by Reflector (next_cycle_seed promotion) between cycles.

CycleId

Per-cycle unique identifier. Survives EXTEND (same cycle continues). Reset on LOOP (new cycle begins from Planner).

EconomicCheck

Economic gate status. Set by Federation Board. "passed" | "failed". Orchestrator routes INTERRUPT if "failed".

FederationShielded

Federation shield. MUST be true before entering the Orchestrator. FederationBoardSkill always seals with true. IntentController rejects envelopes with false at the API boundary.

HighLevelGoal

The immutable goal. Set once at Federation Board. NEVER changed by loop phases.

LockedConstraints

Constraints locked into this cycle. Populated by ConstraintInjectorExecutor from QualityFrame.EarnedConstraints after each Checker verdict. The Orchestrator injects these into each new cycle's envelope on EXTEND/LOOP.

LoopCount

Counts the number of times this trail has looped. Incremented by PlannerExecutor at the start of each cycle. Orchestrator routes ESCALATE when loop_count > 3.

MasterContext

Master context from previous sessions or identity injection. Injected by company-identity-agent at activation time. Preserved across cycles — never cleared by the loop.

OMode

O-Mode classification. Set by Federation Board. Validated by Orchestrator. One of: O-Output | O-Optimize | O-Orchestrate | O-Chain | O-Tree | O-Graph.

Origin

Intent origin tag. One of: federation | round_table | human_refined. Set by FederationBoardSkill. NEVER "raw".

PendingLaws

Unratified constraints surfaced by the Federation Board during refinement. The Reflector promotes these to earned laws (EC-NNN) at cycle close.

TrailId

Unique trail identifier. Format: PMCRO-YYYYMMDD-[6-char hex]. Immutable once set by the Federation Board.
